name: Almond-Crusted Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons chopped fresh basil, or 1/2 tsp. dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush almonds into small pieces; set aside.
2. Flatten chicken breasts between your hands.
3. Season both sides of the chicken with salt and pepper.
4. Dredge each chicken breast in flour, shaking off excess.
5. Dip chicken in beaten egg mixture.
6. Press each chicken breast to coat well with almonds.
7. Arrange coated chicken on a baking sheet covered with butter.
8. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes or until the chicken is firm and the almonds are golden brown.
9. In a separate bowl, combine melted butter, lemon juice, and basil (fresh or dried). Drizzle over cooked chicken breasts.
